message:
feat: replace fake implementations with real ones in JsRunner

- http.request()/http.get() now backed by real fetch() via ClientRequest class
  (parses options, collects body, calls fetch, wraps Response as IncomingMessage)
- worker_threads uses separate JsRunner instances with true isolation:
  each Worker gets its own module cache via fork(), real bidirectional
  message passing with structured clone semantics, correct isMainThread/
  parentPort/workerData in child context
- net.Socket.connect() now emits ERR_SOCKET_NOT_AVAILABLE error instead of
  silently pretending it connected (isIP/isIPv4/isIPv6 still work)
- Fix stripTypes corrupting .js object literals by only running type
  stripping on .ts/.mts files
- Parent run() awaits pending worker threads before returning results
- Worker filenames resolved relative to cwd (bare names treated as local files)
